title: So looks like McDonalds are Asuka Fanboys Wendys joins in
display_title: So looks like McDonalds are Asuka Fanboys Wendys joins in
wikitext:
[]: So looks like McDonalds are Asuka Fanboys (Wendys joins in) Post by lastcody » Fri Apr 05, 2013 12:29 am http://www.crunchyroll.com/anime-news/2013/04/04/american-fast-food-giants-weigh-in-on-evangelion-girl-debate This made me laugh

[]: Post by C.A.P. » Fri Apr 05, 2013 12:33 am I wonder who the Burger King likes...

[]: Re: So looks like McDonalds are Asuka Fanboys (Wendys joins Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Apr 05, 2013 12:42 am McDonald lacks taste, there's nothing new under the sun. EDIT: the part that made me (bitterly) laugh is the one about pixiv, they're probably right about it.

[]: Post by Madonna » Fri Apr 05, 2013 12:58 am Asuka has as much character and quality as a McDonalds burger anyway, so it's no surprise they prefer her.

[]: Post by KnightmareX13 » Fri Apr 05, 2013 1:02 am Wonder what prompted them to ask Mcdonalds or why Mcdonalds even answered

[]: Post by Darkwing » Fri Apr 05, 2013 6:36 am Well of course burger joints aren't going to endorse Rei. She's a vegitarian. Sad to hear that Rei didn't get as much birthday fanart though.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Apr 05, 2013 6:46 am Darkwing wrote: Well of course burger joints aren't going to endorse Rei. She's a vegitarian.

[]: Post by Bagheera » Fri Apr 05, 2013 7:15 am Madonna wrote: Asuka has as much character and quality as a McDonalds burger anyway, so it's no surprise they prefer her.

[]: Post by Madonna » Fri Apr 05, 2013 7:45 am I was kidding , are all Asuka fans so...defensive?

[]: Pretending to ignore the point as usual Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Apr 05, 2013 7:45 am Such unseemly sentiments. This is why Rei doesn't have many fans in the West, too many bitter fans as it is.

[]: Post by lastcody » Fri Apr 05, 2013 8:53 am Everyone tweet Burger King, lets end the debate

[]: Post by driftking18594 » Fri Apr 05, 2013 8:55 am Has nobody thought of KFC or Pizza Hut yet?

[]: Post by lastcody » Fri Apr 05, 2013 9:08 am driftking18594 wrote: Has nobody thought of KFC or Pizza Hut yet?

[]: Re: Pretending to ignore the point as usual Post by Bagheera » Fri Apr 05, 2013 9:32 am Madonna wrote: I was kidding ,

[]: Post by Catamari » Fri Apr 05, 2013 9:44 am Taco Bell had better choose Rei, or I'm going bust a nut.

[]: Post by Squigsquasher » Fri Apr 05, 2013 1:18 pm Poor, poor Rei. It's alright, I'll always love you. Let me get you a bowl of Miso soup and a warm blanket... *Ahem* Anyway...Who honestly cares what manufacturers of crappy burgers have to say about Evangelion? Here's to hoping that Rei steps on McDonalds in Unit 00.

[]: Post by lastcody » Fri Apr 05, 2013 1:24 pm Squigsquasher wrote: Anyway...Who honestly cares what manufacturers of crappy burgers have to say about Evangelion? Here's to hoping that Rei steps on McDonalds in Unit 00.

[]: Post by Bagheera » Fri Apr 05, 2013 1:37 pm It's not like they were really choosing one character over another anyway; whoever was manning the twitter account saw a pic of two girls, one with red hair and blue eyes and the other with blue hair and red eyes, and said "uh . . . I'll go with the one that looks like a normal person, sue me" and here we are. The Wendy's response wasn't even related to the pic (note their mascot). So, Rei was only dissed in the loosest possible sense of the term.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Apr 05, 2013 1:57 pm Doesn't look like the tweets from McDonalds and Wendy's even exist anymore. Elaborate hoax?

[]: Post by esselfortium » Fri Apr 05, 2013 2:02 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Doesn't look like the tweets from McDonalds and Wendy's even exist anymore. Elaborate hoax?
